title: Arcana Public Command Surface
description: Authoritative contract linking each public Arcana-shipped slash command to its skill source, invocation home, workflow owner, safety posture, and validation profile.

preconditions: Unmanaged directory under the grimoire home
commands.mutation_behavior: Writes a new grimoire.json manifest into an existing unmanaged folder and refuses to overwrite an existing manifest. User mirror of /arc-adopt.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/adopt_grimoire.py TARGET --skill-prefix PREFIX --description DESC; python rites/sync_library.py --apply

commands.mutation_behavior: Creates a new grimoire directory, scaffold files, starter chapters, git repository, and library entry.
commands.log_behavior: Creates the new grimoire log.md with the initial creation entry.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/validate_grimoire_structure.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT; python rites/validate_frontmatter.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT; python rites/validate_links.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT

preconditions: Material to add (a topic or a chat answer to capture)
commands.mutation_behavior: Adds knowledge to the active grimoire as a page or a chapter, sized to the material; stamps leaf pages via new_page.py, scaffolds a chapter hub from formula when warranted, and wires the addition into a hub. External sources go through /grm-import.
commands.log_behavior: Appends one create entry to the active grimoire log.md.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/validate_grimoire_structure.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT; python rites/validate_frontmatter.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT; python rites/validate_links.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT

preconditions: Source file, source folder, or inbox sweep
commands.mutation_behavior: Imports classified inputs into sources or chapters, then updates derived pages and hubs.
commands.log_behavior: Appends one import entry to the active grimoire log.md per operation.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/validate_frontmatter.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT; python rites/validate_provenance.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT; python rites/validate_links.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT

preconditions: Registered active grimoire (for the skills sub-target)
One of the sub-targets skills, library, or agentfile, or bare to run all three
commands.mutation_behavior: Routes an optional positional sub-target (bare runs all three). skills: registers Arcana-shipped and active-grimoire skills via sync_skills.py. library: reconciles ~/grimoires/library.json against disk via sync_library.py. agentfile: creates or refreshes the marked Grimoire instruction block via inject_agent_file.py, falling to a judgment edit only for files with ambiguous markers. A bare invocation reconciles all three scopes and reports every scope, including those it leaves unchanged. User mirror of /arc-sync.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/sync_skills.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT --dry-run; python rites/sync_library.py; python rites/inject_agent_file.py

preconditions: Arcana is not the active target
commands.mutation_behavior: Runs the deterministic grimoire validator suite against the active grimoire, optionally narrowed by selector; parallel mode may refresh transient rite artifacts.
Runs a grimoire health check with mechanical validators and judgment passes; applies only approved fixes.
commands.log_behavior: Appends one health-check entry to the active grimoire log.md when fixes are applied.

preconditions: Arcana is not the active target
commands.mutation_behavior: Reads the active grimoire and reports semantic naming, routing, and discoverability findings.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire logs unless a separate apply workflow edits files.
commands.validation_profile: Run grimoire validators after applying any accepted recommendations.

commands.mutation_behavior: Reads the active grimoire and reports magical-boundary terminology and layer-separation findings.
commands.validation_profile: Run as a judgment pass; confirm fixes with /grm-validate structure and /grm-validate links when files change.

commands.mutation_behavior: Dry-run reports filename-only wikilink repairs; --apply rewrites unambiguous wikilinks in active-grimoire Markdown files.
commands.log_behavior: Records repair details in active-grimoire log.md through the invocation workflow after apply.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/repair_links.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT; python rites/validate_links.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT; python rites/validate_orphans.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT

commands.mutation_behavior: Follows the UPDATE.md procedure: pulls Arcana with git --ff-only, then runs summon.py --update --apply to reconcile the library, pull every grimoire (branch-aware, manual-pull fallback for private hosts), reset and sync skills, refresh marked agent blocks, and heal only the grimoires confirmed current.
Reads the generated Arcana skill catalog and the active grimoire's own skill frontmatter; presents the /grm-* family and the grimoire's own skills.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/sync_docs.py --apply when Arcana skill frontmatter or command-surface metadata changes.

commands.mutation_behavior: Runs the deterministic Arcana validator suite, optionally narrowed by selector; parallel mode may refresh transient rite artifacts.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.

preconditions: One positional sub-target: skills, library, or agentfile
commands.mutation_behavior: Routes a single positional sub-target. skills: registers Arcana-shipped and installed grimoire skills into supported agent skill directories via rites/sync_skills.py. library: reconciles ~/grimoires/library.json against disk via rites/sync_library.py. agentfile: refreshes the marked Grimoire instruction block in user agent instruction files as a judgment edit. A bare invocation with no sub-target refuses and lists the sub-targets; it never defaults to all because agentfile rewrites user agent files.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.
commands.validation_profile: skills: python rites/sync_skills.py --dry-run. library: python rites/sync_library.py. agentfile: re-read touched files and confirm exactly one canonical Grimoire block per file.

preconditions: Unmanaged directory under the grimoire home
commands.mutation_behavior: Writes a new grimoire.json manifest and refuses to overwrite an existing manifest.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/adopt_grimoire.py TARGET --skill-prefix PREFIX --description DESC; python rites/sync_library.py --apply

commands.mutation_behavior: Deletes known temporary rite artifacts; dry-run previews removals.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Follows the UPDATE.md procedure: pulls Arcana with git --ff-only, then runs summon.py --update --apply to reconcile the library, pull every grimoire (branch-aware, manual-pull fallback for private hosts), reset and sync skills, refresh marked agent blocks, and heal only the grimoires confirmed current.
May edit Arcana source, docs, tests, skills, and generated artifacts after reading current context.
commands.log_behavior: Updates CHANGELOG.md for user-visible Arcana changes.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/validate.py --parallel; python -m pytest; python rites/sync_docs.py --apply when generated docs change.

commands.mutation_behavior: Reads generated Arcana skill catalog and locally registered grimoire skill frontmatter.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/sync_docs.py --apply when Arcana skill frontmatter or command-surface metadata changes.
